ai_summary: Validate natural isotopic abundance percentages and nuclear spin quantum numbers for NMR-active stable isotopes from authoritative nuclear data tables (NUBASE/IUPAC).
general_notes: All values come from NUBASE2020 / IUPAC isotopic compositions tables. Natural abundance is expressed as a percentage of all naturally occurring atoms of that element. Nuclear spin I is expressed in units of hbar (h-bar) as a simple fraction (e.g. 1/2, 3/2, 9/2). These are fixed physical constants — values from any year are equivalent.

columns.name: Isotope
columns.notes: Nuclide notation: element symbol hyphen mass number (e.g. Xe-129). Unique identifier.

columns.name: Natural Abundance (%)
columns.notes: Mole fraction of the isotope in the naturally occurring element, expressed as percent. Source: IUPAC 2016 atomic weights / NUBASE2020. Report to at least 3 decimal places where available.

columns.name: Nuclear Spin (hbar)
columns.notes: Ground-state nuclear spin quantum number I in units of hbar. Express as fraction: 1/2, 3/2, 9/2, etc. Source: NUBASE2020.
